scripts.test-deployment-docs: node scripts/qa/test_incident_response_restriction_playbooks.js && node scripts/qa/test_governance_watchtower_docs.js && node scripts/qa/test_key_hierarchy_docs.js && node scripts/qa/test_restriction_schema_activation_docs.js && node scripts/qa/test_stolen_funds_wallet_drill_docs.js && node scripts/qa/test_scam_contract_quarantine_drill_docs.js
scripts.validate-wallet-extension-release: npm run test-wallet-docs && npm run test-wallet-extension && npm run test-wallet
scripts.prepare-wallet-extension-release: npm run validate-wallet-extension-release && npm run package-wallet-extension
